nasb.text: They drink their fill of the abundance of Your house; And You give them to drink of the river of Your delights.

esv.text: They feast on the abundance of your house, and you give them drink from the river of your delights.

cnv.text: 他們必飽嘗你殿裡的盛筵， 你必使他們喝你樂河的水。

ccb.text: 你让他们饱享你殿里的美食， 畅饮你乐河中的水。

csbs.text: 他们饱尝你家中的肥甘， 你给他们喝你喜乐河的水；
